title: currencies.convert
description: Convert an amount between two currencies via the configured base-currency cross rate. Amounts are decimal strings on the wire (Decimal internally, floats never). Returns {"amount": "<decimal string>"} quantized to STAPEL_CURRENCIES['CONVERSION_DECIMAL_PLACES']. Unknown or inactive codes fail with error.400.unknown_currency.

amount.description: Amount to convert, as a decimal string (e.g. "100.00").

from_currency.description: ISO 4217 code of the source currency.

to_currency.description: ISO 4217 code of the target currency.
